name: Cap Captcha
tagline: The self-hosted CAPTCHA for the modern web.
description:
The self-hosted CAPTCHA for the modern web.

Docs: https://capjs.js.org/guide/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  cap:
    image: tiago2/cap:3.0.4
    environment:
      - ADMIN_KEY=c5c3ca6e8ed0e0e664fb48ab1eb0136d
      - REDIS_URL=redis://valkey:6379
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - bun
        - -e
        - fetch('http://localhost:3000').then(r => { if (!r.ok) process.exit(1) }).catch(() => process.exit(1))
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 5s
    depends_on:
      valkey:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42007:3000
  valkey:
    image: valkey/valkey:9-alpine
    volumes:
      - valkey-data:/data
    command: valkey-server --save 60 1 --loglevel warning --maxmemory-policy noeviction
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - valkey-cli
        - ping
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  valkey-data: null
